name: Cottage Cheese and Oil Pastry (3)
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the cottage cheese through a fine sieve, if desired and mix with the milk, egg yolk, and 1/2 egg white.
2. Add oil and salt to the mixture.
3. Mix and sift together the flour and Backin.
4. Gradually add the flour mixture to the other ingredients, a little at a time, until slightly more than half has been used.
5. Knead in the remaining flour.
